name: detectors: supply-chain.sh checks for SLSA-compliant build provenance in package.json + npm shrinkwrap or pnpm-lock.yaml (g-node-010)
command: mkdir -p proj && printf "{\"name\":\"app\",\"version\":\"1.0.0\"}\n" > proj/package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/supply-chain.sh" --json --paths "proj/" --check slsa
